capacity_rejections.graphmixer_or_dygformer: Efficient temporal graph architectures are appropriate once the graph has enough repeated pre-event interactions; current outer folds still favor the de-vigged market proxy.
capacity_rejections.temporal_graph_neural_network: 253 matches and sparse team histories are insufficient for a credible high-capacity chronological comparison. Production gate requires at least 2000 timestamped fixtures and roughly 30 temporal edges per team.
capacity_rejections.transformer_sequence_model: Effective sample size is orders of magnitude below a defensible sequence-model championship; fitting would invite leakage and variance-driven selection.

candidate_families.current_status: Registered as regularized_multinomial_research; not promoted because market proxy dominates outer folds.
candidate_families.name: CatBoost/LightGBM tabular rating model
candidate_families.use_when: Hundreds to thousands of fixtures with stable engineered features; strong baseline before neural models.

candidate_families.current_status: Dixon-Coles is shadow-only; paired-bootstrap improvement is not statistically secure.
candidate_families.name: Hierarchical dynamic Poisson / Dixon-Coles
candidate_families.use_when: Goal-score modeling with team attack/defense partial pooling and enough repeated team histories.

candidate_families.current_status: Rejected by evidence gate; current graph has too few temporal edges per team for credible fitting.
candidate_families.name: Temporal Graph Network / TGAT-style dynamic graph
candidate_families.use_when: Thousands of time-stamped team/player/match edges, node features, and strictly pre-event labels.

candidate_families.current_status: Research registry only; no production weight without outer-fold improvement over market baselines.
candidate_families.name: GraphMixer / DyGFormer-style efficient temporal graph
candidate_families.use_when: Large temporal interaction graphs where memory/lightweight mixing architectures can be compared out of sample.

candidate_families.current_status: Rejected by sample-size gate; likely overfits current sparse World Cup/qualifier history.
candidate_families.name: Sequence transformer over team histories
candidate_families.use_when: Long sequential histories with lineup/player/context tokens and a separate untouched tournament holdout.

pitfalls_controlled: look-ahead leakage from using future ratings or post-kickoff prices
same-day split leakage across matches in one matchday
winner's curse from trying many architectures on a tiny holdout
probability calibration ignored in favor of accuracy
profitability inferred without executable timestamped closing odds
naive stacking weights selected outside chronological folds

promotion_gate.required_validation: nested walk-forward model selection, final untouched holdout, paired bootstrap for proper scores, calibration plots, profitability/CLV only against timestamp-verified closing odds, and multiple-testing correction across searched variants

research_sources.applies_to: TGN candidate registry and temporal-edge data requirements
research_sources.title: Temporal Graph Networks for Deep Learning on Dynamic Graphs
GraphMixer: Efficient Temporal Graph Learning with MLP-Mixer

research_sources.applies_to: reporting limitations, intended use, and validation status
research_sources.title: Model Cards for Model Reporting

deep_learning_research.summary: Deep and graph models remain research-track only. The available complete 1X2 proxy-market corpus has 213 complete matches after filtering and 253 total historical match rows, far below the prespecified evidence gate for a production temporal GNN or sequence transformer.

selection_rule: inner rolling-origin tuning inside four expanding outer folds; minimum outer mean log loss then Brier; final holdout is evaluation-only
